body: Hey Amara, following up on our conversation from last week — I wanted to share that [Accel](org/accel) is moving forward with a term sheet for Solaris Grid, and I know you mentioned Halfway had been tracking them as well. Given the overlap in our thesis around distributed energy infrastructure, I thought it might be worth a quick call to see if there's a co-investment angle here rather than stepping on each other's toes. I've seen you and the Halfway team do really thoughtful work at the seed stage in this space, and frankly having your operational network alongside our growth-stage muscle could be a strong combination for the founders. Let me know if you're open to a 30-minute call early next week — happy to share more of what we're seeing on the diligence side.
